description: Extract shared adapter validation helper, add parity tests, and introduce runtime lifecycle APIs (CloseDefaultStore, ResetDefaultStoreForTest) for clean DB connection management.

userStories.title: Add KnownAdapters slice to config.go
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a package-level KnownAdapters slice in config.go that lists all supported adapter names so that validation and parity tests have a single source of truth.
acceptanceCriteria: A package-level exported variable `KnownAdapters` of type `[]string` exists in config.go
KnownAdapters contains exactly AdapterTurso and AdapterPostgres (in that order)
The existing AdapterTurso and AdapterPostgres constants remain unchanged
No existing function behavior is modified
go vet ./internal/cloud/deploy/... passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extract validateAdapter method on Config in config.go
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to extract the duplicated adapter switch logic from Config.Validate and Config.ValidateStore into a single unexported validateAdapter method on Config so that adapter-specific field checks live in exactly one place.
acceptanceCriteria: A method `func (c Config) validateAdapter() error` exists in config.go

validateAdapter contains the switch block with cases for AdapterTurso (checks TursoURL, TursoAuthToken) and AdapterPostgres (checks PostgresDSN), plus a default case returning an error for unknown adapters
The error messages from validateAdapter match the existing error messages exactly
go vet ./internal/cloud/deploy/... passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor ValidateStore to delegate to validateAdapter
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Config.ValidateStore to call validateAdapter and return its error directly, removing its own adapter switch block, so that adapter checks are no longer duplicated.
acceptanceCriteria: Config.ValidateStore() calls c.validateAdapter() and returns its result
Config.ValidateStore() body contains no switch statement on DBAdapter
All existing TestConfigValidateStore test cases pass unchanged
go test ./internal/cloud/deploy/... passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Refactor Config.Validate to delegate to validateAdapter
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Config.Validate to call validateAdapter first, return early on error, then check runner fields, eliminating its own adapter switch block.
acceptanceCriteria: Config.Validate() calls c.validateAdapter() first and returns early if error is non-nil
Config.Validate() then checks RunnerURL and RunnerServiceToken as before
Config.Validate() body contains no switch statement on DBAdapter
All existing TestConfigValidate test cases pass unchanged
go test ./internal/cloud/deploy/... passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add adapter validation parity test
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a test that automatically fails if a new adapter is added to KnownAdapters but not handled in OpenStore, or vice versa, preventing silent drift between validation and store opening.
acceptanceCriteria: A TestAdapterValidationParity test exists in config_test.go or parity_test.go
The test iterates over KnownAdapters and verifies each adapter does NOT produce an 'unsupported adapter' error from OpenStore (it may fail for other reasons like connection refused)
The test verifies that an adapter NOT in KnownAdapters (e.g. 'mysql') DOES produce an 'unsupported adapter' error from OpenStore
The test verifies validateAdapter accepts every adapter in KnownAdapters with valid fields and rejects an unknown adapter
go test ./internal/cloud/deploy/... passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add CloseDefaultStore function to runtime.go
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an explicit function to close the cached *sql.DB connection held by DefaultStoreFactory so that commands and tests can cleanly release database resources.
acceptanceCriteria: A function CloseDefaultStore() error exists in runtime.go
It closes defaultDB if non-nil and returns the error from db.Close()
It returns nil when defaultDB is nil (safe no-op)
go vet ./internal/cloud/deploy/... passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add ResetDefaultStoreForTest helper to runtime.go
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a test helper that resets the package-level sync.Once and cached store/DB/error so that multiple tests can exercise DefaultStoreFactory in isolation.
acceptanceCriteria: An exported function ResetDefaultStoreForTest(t *testing.T) exists in runtime.go
It calls t.Helper()
It resets defaultOnce to a zero sync.Once value
It sets defaultStore, defaultDB, and defaultErr to nil
go vet ./internal/cloud/deploy/... passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add driver registration assertion test
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a test that verifies the blank imports in drivers.go correctly register both libsql and pgx database drivers so that sql.Open calls work at runtime.
acceptanceCriteria: A TestDriversRegistered test exists in drivers_test.go
The test calls sql.Drivers() and asserts 'libsql' is present in the returned slice
The test calls sql.Drivers() and asserts 'pgx' is present in the returned slice
go test ./internal/cloud/deploy/... passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add runtime lifecycle integration test using ResetDefaultStoreForTest
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a test that demonstrates ResetDefaultStoreForTest enables re-initialization of DefaultStoreFactory, proving the lifecycle API works for test isolation.
acceptanceCriteria: A TestDefaultStoreFactory_ResetIsolation test exists in runtime_test.go
The test calls ResetDefaultStoreForTest(t) and then DefaultStoreFactory() to verify clean state
The test verifies that after reset, calling DefaultStoreFactory re-triggers initialization (config loader runs again, not returning stale cached values)
Existing TestNewStoreFactory_* tests remain unchanged
go test ./internal/cloud/deploy/... passes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Run full test suite and vet to verify integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify that all changes integrate cleanly with no test failures or vet warnings across the entire project.
acceptanceCriteria: make test passes with all tests green (exit code 0)
